limitations: Play Console forms, production SDK switches, provider contractual roles, retention, Google Signals, product links, data-sharing settings, UMP publications, and live country settings are CONSOLE_UNVERIFIED.
Do not submit this file mechanically. The owner must reconcile it with the exact release artifact and current provider documentation in Play Console.

data_safety.evidence: Google Mobile Ads uses IP address to estimate general location and automatically collects/shares it; Analytics derives coarse location from masked IP.
Mobile Ads automatically collects/shares product interactions; Analytics automatically collects lifecycle events, screen views, and sessions.
Crashlytics automatically collects stack traces. Google Play sharing treatment depends on verified provider role/terms, which the repository cannot prove.
Mobile Ads automatically collects/shares diagnostics; Crashlytics and Sessions collect crash, device, session, network, and performance-related metadata.
Mobile Ads collects/shares advertising, app-set, and supported account/device identifiers; Analytics, Installations, and Crashlytics create app-instance/install identifiers.

apps.additional_data_types: No additional Google Play user-data type was proven from the inspected app-authored source and resolved direct SDK set; absence in source does not prove absence in live SDK/configuration.
apps.user_directed_sharing: No app-authored user-directed sharing feature was identified.
apps.delete_account_requirement: Not applicable based on no account system identified; owner must verify Play Console.
apps.encryption_in_transit: Google documents TLS for Mobile Ads and Analytics data; an app-level universal encryption declaration remains OWNER_CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED.
apps.deletion_request_mechanism: Support email plus provider/device controls, each with limited scope; no in-app account deletion because no account exists.
